rationale: Educ. Code §21.508 governs teacher certification program agreements; it has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. No conflict.
quote: Sec. 21.508. AGREEMENT. A person selected to participate in the program must enter into a written agreement with the agency under which the person agrees to:
_note: Rule text is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change; no conflict identified.
